Title: Product1(Main_1) × Location(Main_1 / —), Global OFF → Today
Preconditions: Product1 assigned to Main_1 FFC; Pickup Location L1 Active=true with Main FC=Main_1, no Transfer FCs; EnableGlobalTransfer=FALSE
Steps:
1) Open PDP for Product1
2) Open pickup list/modal and find Location L1
3) Add Product1 to cart → open Cart → open PickPoints modal and find L1
Expected: PDP & Cart show L1 with availability label 'Today' (TodayDurationText). No 'Transfer' or 'Global' label.

Title: Product1(Main_1) × Location(— / Transfer_1), Global OFF → Not available
Preconditions: Product1 assigned to Main_1 FFC; Pickup Location L2 Active=true with no Main FC, Transfer FCs={Transfer_1}; EnableGlobalTransfer=FALSE
Steps:
1) Open PDP for Product1 → pickup list/modal → find L2
2) Add to Cart → PickPoints modal → find L2
Expected: L2 is displayed as 'Not available' (or disabled/unselectable) for Product1; cannot select it for pickup.

Title: Product1(Main_1) × Location(— / Transfer_1), Global ON → Global Transfer
Preconditions: Product1 assigned to Main_1 FFC; Pickup Location L2 Active=true with no Main FC, Transfer FCs={Transfer_1}; EnableGlobalTransfer=TRUE
Steps:
1) Open PDP for Product1 → pickup list/modal → find L2
2) Add to Cart → PickPoints modal → find L2
Expected: L2 shows 'Global Transfer (1 week)' (GlobalTransferDurationText) for Product1; selection allowed if design permits Global.
